summary: Daedalus agent initialized with role: architect

Designed recurring class system for TapIn using series+override pattern. RecurringClass template in Firestore 'recurringClasses' collection. Individual overrides stored in 'classes' with recurringClassId, isOverride, isCancelled flags. Virtual IDs for generated occurrences use format recurring:{rcId}:{date}.

description: Designed full MVP architecture: DEC-001 through DEC-006. Group-first model, Expo+Firebase, Zustand, 5-tab nav, technique + queue subcollections.
